_meta.description: Effect-specific extras and flaws for Mutants & Masterminds 4e — modifiers that only apply to (or only make sense on) one particular base effect from effects.json, as opposed to the general-purpose pool in modifiers.json. All 'description' fields are original, short paraphrases written for this project, not taken from the rulebook. Mechanical fields (category, costFormula, flat) reflect game rules/facts, not copyrighted prose.
_meta.usageNote: When building a Power's effect instance, a modifier picker should offer BOTH the relevant entries from modifiers.json (general pool) AND the entries here for the chosen effectId. The two pools are additive, not exclusive — e.g. a Damage effect can take the general 'Ranged' extra AND the Damage-specific 'Strength-Based' extra at the same time.
_meta.coverageNote: Not every effect in effects.json has entries here. Simpler effects (Comprehend, Postcognition, Precognition, Speed, Swimming) rely solely on the general modifiers.json pool and have no effect-specific extras/flaws of their own (verified directly against the source text, not just assumed). Enhanced Movement and Comprehend instead grant a menu of purchasable sub-abilities as part of configuring the base effect rather than true cost modifiers -- see docs/mm-powers-ui-design.md for that menu data. Enhanced Senses has BOTH a sub-ability menu AND a small set of genuine general-purpose extras/flaws layered on top (included below).

categoryKey.extra: Increases the effect's cost and adds a benefit
categoryKey.flaw: Decreases the effect's cost and adds a restriction

_meta.flatNote: flat: true means a one-time addition/reduction to the effect's total, not multiplied by the effect's rank. flat: false means the cost applies per rank of the effect.
_meta.costValueNote: costValue is the canonical numeric magnitude of the modifier (always non-negative; the sign comes from whether it is an extra or a flaw). For 'or'/'up to' formulas it is the lowest positive value; referential costs (e.g. Reduced Trait) are 0 and handled specially.
_meta.rankedNote: ranked: true means the modifier is bought in its own ranks, independent of the effect's rank, so its contribution is costValue x its rank. These are the flat modifiers whose costFormula reads 'flat per rank'.
_meta.categoryNote: category (extra/flaw) is not stored per entry; it is implied by whether the modifier sits in an 'extras' or 'flaws' array and is injected by the loader.
_meta.overridesNote: overrides maps a base-effect game-term field (range, action, duration, resistance, check, effectType) to the value this modifier forces it to, for the generated game-terms summary only (not the point cost).
_meta.impactNote: Effect-specific modifiers support the same non-cost game-term impact fields as the general pool (see modifiers.json's impactNote): 'checkBonus' (signed attack-roll adjustment, x rank), 'dropsCheck' (removes the attack roll), 'checkNote' (parenthetical appended to the check row), and 'stepField'+'stepBy' (move a field along its gameTermLadders ordering, which live in modifiers.json). Any attached modifier with no such impact is listed by name in the effect's Notes row automatically, so narrative extras/flaws here need no extra fields.

extras.name: Concentration
extras.description: Reapplies the Affliction each turn you Concentrate to maintain it.

extras.name: Contagious
extras.description: Spreads to anyone who touches an affected target.

extras.name: Cumulative
extras.description: Repeated failed resistance checks stack toward a worse degree.

extras.name: Empowering
extras.description: The major condition transforms the target into a form with bonus power points.

extras.name: Progressive
extras.description: Each failed resistance check against the ongoing Affliction worsens it by a degree.

extras.name: Prolonged
extras.description: Further resistance checks only happen once per scene instead of per round or minute.

extras.name: Reversible
extras.description: You can remove the conditions you imposed at will.

extras.name: Sustained
extras.description: Reapplies a fresh Affliction each turn while you Sustain it, no attack roll needed.

extras.name: Variable Conditions
extras.description: Choose which conditions to impose at the moment of use instead of locking them in.

flaws.name: Decreasing Difficulty
flaws.description: Each repeated resistance check against it gets easier for the target.

flaws.name: Instant Recovery
flaws.description: The imposed conditions clear automatically once the effect's duration ends.

flaws.name: Limited Degree

config.label: No effect at
config.hint: Which degree of failure imposes no condition.

flaws.description: One degree of failure imposes no condition at all.

flaws.name: Onset
flaws.description: Conditions don't take hold immediately — they kick in after a delay.

extras.name: Penetrating
extras.description: Lets you dig through materials otherwise too hard to burrow through.

extras.name: Ranged
extras.description: Dig tunnels remotely, or grant Burrowing to someone else at a distance.

flaws.name: Limited
flaws.description: Only works through certain materials, like loose soil but not rock.

flaws.name: No Collapse
flaws.description: Your tunnels always stay stable and can't be collapsed on purpose.

flaws.name: No Tunnel
flaws.description: Your tunnels always collapse behind you instead of staying open.

extras.name: Broadcast
extras.description: Reaches every receiver in range simultaneously.

extras.name: Dimensional
extras.description: Extends your signal into other dimensions.

extras.name: Rapid
extras.description: Transmits information far faster than normal speech.

extras.name: Selective
extras.description: Lets you pick exactly who among your broadcast receivers gets the message.

extras.name: Subtle
extras.description: Encrypts or hides your transmission from eavesdroppers.

flaws.name: Limited
flaws.description: Only reaches a specific group, like a species or organization.

flaws.name: One-Way
flaws.description: You can transmit but not receive replies.

flaws.name: Sense-Dependent (carried effect)
flaws.description: Another linked effect only works while your Communication channel is open.

extras.name: Affects Others
extras.description: Extends your Concealment to another character you're touching (or at range, with the Ranged extra).

extras.name: Precise
extras.description: Freely dial your Concealment from total to partial to none, or conceal only part of yourself, as a free action.

flaws.name: Blending
flaws.description: Only works while moving no faster than a slow walk (speed rank 1).

flaws.name: Limited
flaws.description: Only works under specific conditions, like in fog, shadows, or against technological senses.

flaws.name: Partial
flaws.description: Only grants Partial Concealment (a smaller penalty to attacks, easier to see through) instead of Full Concealment.

flaws.name: Passive
flaws.description: Drops the moment you take a standard action requiring a check, reactivating next turn.

flaws.name: Resistible
flaws.description: Anyone aware of or looking for you gets a resistance check to see through it.

extras.name: Continuous
extras.description: Created objects need no upkeep and persist until destroyed or dismissed.

extras.name: Equipment
extras.description: Lets you create fully-functional equipment instead of inert objects.

extras.name: Increased Volume
extras.description: Raises the maximum volume of objects you can create.

extras.name: Movable
extras.description: Grants a Move Object effect that only works on your own creations.

extras.name: Permanent
extras.description: Created objects need no maintenance but can never be repaired or altered afterward.

extras.name: Precise
extras.description: Lets you create objects with fine detail and moving parts.

extras.name: Selective
extras.description: Your created objects can selectively let some attacks or characters pass through.

extras.name: Self-Repairing
extras.description: Damaged creations mend themselves automatically each turn.

extras.name: Stationary
extras.description: Created objects hang immobile in the air, resisting being moved.

extras.name: Subtle
extras.description: Creations look completely real, or are undetectable as constructs.

extras.name: Variable Opacity
extras.description: Choose whether each creation is opaque, translucent, or transparent.

flaws.name: Feedback
flaws.description: You're hurt when a creation you're maintaining is damaged.

flaws.name: Fragile
flaws.description: Lowers the maximum Toughness of your created objects.

flaws.name: Proportional
flaws.description: You split ranks between an object's size and its toughness instead of getting both at full rank.

flaws.name: Small
flaws.description: Lowers the maximum volume of objects you can create.

flaws.name: Weakness
flaws.description: Your creations automatically fail their Damage resistance checks.

extras.name: Strength-Based
extras.description: Adds your Strength rank to this Damage effect's rank, like a melee weapon or claws.

extras.name: Aura
extras.description: Blocks attacks against you automatically, with no action required.

extras.name: Free Action
extras.description: Lets you Deflect as a free action.

extras.name: Ranged
extras.description: Lets you Deflect attacks aimed at allies within range.

extras.name: Reaction
extras.description: Lets you Deflect using your reaction for the round.

extras.name: Redirect
extras.description: A successful block lets you use the Redirect advantage.

extras.name: Reflect
extras.description: Every successful block automatically redirects the attack, no action needed.

extras.name: Simple Action
extras.description: Lets you Deflect as a simple action.

flaws.name: Limited
flaws.costFormula: -1 point per rank or by category
flaws.description: Only deflects a specific category of ranged attack.

extras.name: Slithering
extras.description: Grants the Slithering movement effect while elongated.

extras.name: Striding
extras.description: Longer strides grant ranks of Speed.

extras.name: Swinging
extras.description: Grants the Swinging movement effect using your stretched limbs.

extras.name: Sustained
extras.description: Turns the bonus into a toggle you activate and maintain, usable for power stunts.

flaws.name: Limited
flaws.description: The bonus only applies in a specific circumstance, like at night or while angry.

flaws.name: Reduced Trait
flaws.costFormula: -1x the cost of the reduced trait, flat

config.label: Reduces
config.hint: Which trait is lowered to pay for the boosted one.

flaws.description: Boosts one trait at the cost of lowering another.

extras.name: Shape
extras.description: Changes the area's default shape from a sphere to a cone, cube, or similar.

extras.name: Variable
extras.description: Lets you mix and match different environmental hazards within your point budget.

extras.name: Continuous
extras.description: Extra limbs stay active without needing upkeep once toggled on.

extras.name: Projection
extras.description: Harm to your extra limbs doesn't carry over to you.

extras.name: Sustained
extras.description: Extra limbs can be toggled on and off but need upkeep to stay active.

extras.name: Variable
extras.description: Reassign your limbs between grabbing and stability use each turn.

flaws.name: Distracting
flaws.description: You're left Vulnerable while actively using your extra limbs.

flaws.name: Limited to Extra Limbs
flaws.description: Another effect or modifier only works through your extra limbs.

extras.name: Sustained
extras.description: Makes an otherwise-passive Feature something you actively activate and maintain.

extras.name: Continuous
extras.description: You hover in place automatically without needing to maintain the effect.

extras.name: Safe Landing
extras.description: You float safely down if your Flight ever fails or ends.

extras.name: Subtle
extras.description: Removes the noise, wind, or visible trail your Flight normally leaves.

flaws.name: Concentration
flaws.description: Flying takes constant focus, leaving little room to do anything else.

flaws.name: Distracting
flaws.description: You're Vulnerable the whole time you're flying.

flaws.name: Gliding
flaws.description: You can only gain altitude by catching favorable winds or thermals.

flaws.name: Levitation
flaws.description: You can only move straight up and down, not side to side.

flaws.name: Platform
flaws.description: Your Flight depends on standing on a physical platform that can be knocked away.

flaws.name: Restrainable
flaws.description: Being Immobilized grounds you until you can reactivate the effect.

flaws.name: Rocket
flaws.description: You can only fly in a straight line; turning costs an extra action.

extras.name: Additional Use
extras.description: Grants an extra use of Fortune Control per rank (capped by heroic-advantage limits).

extras.name: Enhanced Advantages
extras.description: Lets you acquire fortune/heroic advantages through this effect.

flaws.name: Action
flaws.description: Requires a slower action to use, limiting when you can respond to others.

flaws.name: Attack Check
flaws.description: Requires a successful ranged attack check to affect a target.

flaws.name: Resistible
flaws.description: Targets get a resistance check to avoid its effects.

flaws.name: Side Effect
flaws.description: A failed use backfires as a complication, with no Hero Point awarded.

extras.name: Growth Momentum
extras.description: Growing on your turn and landing a close hit penalizes the target's resistance check.

extras.name: Permanent
extras.description: Your larger size becomes your normal, permanent size category at no extra cost.

extras.name: Area Effect
extras.description: Heals every willing subject within the affected area.

extras.name: Energizing
extras.description: Removes Fatigued and Exhausted conditions instead of damage conditions.

extras.name: Perception Range
extras.description: Heals any subject you can accurately perceive, no touch required.

extras.name: Persistent
extras.description: Can heal damage from effects that are normally Incurable.

extras.name: Ranged
extras.description: Works at normal range instead of requiring touch.

extras.name: Repair
extras.description: Lets you mend damage conditions on objects, not just people.

extras.name: Resurrection
extras.description: Can restore a dead subject to life, at the cost of Extra Effort.

extras.name: Selective
extras.description: Lets you choose who in an Area Effect Healing benefits and who doesn't.

flaws.name: Empathic
flaws.description: You take on the conditions you heal from someone else.

flaws.name: Limited
flaws.description: Restricted to one type of damage, or only usable on others (or only on yourself).

flaws.name: Temporary
flaws.description: The healed conditions return after about an hour.

extras.name: Active
extras.description: Even a moving, interactive illusion only needs a Sustain action to maintain.

extras.name: Continuous
extras.description: An active illusion needs no maintenance once set in motion.

extras.name: Selective
extras.description: Choose exactly who perceives the illusion.

flaws.name: Feedback
flaws.description: A successful physical attack on your illusion stuns you.

flaws.name: Limited to Minds
flaws.description: Mindless devices like cameras can't perceive the illusion at all.

flaws.name: Limited to One Subject
flaws.description: Only one observer at a time can perceive it.

flaws.name: Resistible
flaws.description: Observers get an early resistance check to see through it on first encounter.

extras.name: Affects Others
extras.description: Grants your Immunity to someone else by touch.

extras.name: Area Effect
extras.description: Extends a shared Immunity to everyone in an area, like a life-support bubble.

extras.name: Ranged
extras.description: Lets a shared Immunity be granted at a distance.

extras.name: Redirect
extras.costFormula: +1 point flat (or per rank for sustained/continuous)
extras.description: Lets you redirect attacks you're immune to at a new target.

extras.name: Sustained
extras.description: Turns a normally-permanent Immunity into something you activate and maintain.

flaws.name: Concentration
flaws.description: Requires a Concentrate action each turn to keep the Immunity active.

flaws.name: Resistance
flaws.description: Halves the effect's rank before you resist instead of ignoring it outright.

extras.name: Affects Corporeal
extras.description: Lets an incorporeal character still affect the physical world.

extras.name: Affects Others
extras.description: Extends your Insubstantial state to another willing character by touch.

extras.name: Continuous
extras.description: Stay insubstantial until you choose to return to solid form.

extras.name: Linked
extras.description: Notes that other effects commonly activate together with going insubstantial.

extras.name: Normally Insubstantial
extras.description: Insubstantial is your natural state; becoming solid is what requires upkeep.

extras.name: Permanent
extras.description: You're always insubstantial and can't voluntarily become solid.

extras.name: Precise
extras.description: Lets part of your body stay solid while the rest remains insubstantial.

extras.name: Subtle
extras.description: Makes your insubstantial state hard or impossible to notice.

flaws.name: Limited to While Insubstantial
flaws.description: Another effect or modifier only works while you're insubstantial.

flaws.name: No Strength
flaws.description: Removes your effective Strength while in the lowest (fluid) rank.

flaws.name: Acrobatics Check Required
flaws.description: Needs a successful Acrobatics check to use your full Leaping rank.

flaws.name: Full Power
flaws.description: You can only make maximum-distance leaps, never shorter controlled ones.

extras.name: Still Strength
extras.description: Lets you exert your Lifting just by touching something, without needing leverage.

extras.name: Cumulative
extras.description: New degrees of success stack onto your existing degree of contact.

extras.name: Effortless
extras.description: Retrying after a bad failure never requires Extra Effort.

extras.name: Sensory Link
extras.description: Lets you perceive through the target's senses once contact is deep enough.

extras.name: Subtle
extras.description: Makes the mental intrusion hard or impossible to detect.

flaws.name: Close
flaws.description: Requires touching and maintaining physical contact with an unwilling target.

flaws.name: Feedback
flaws.description: You suffer if the subject you're reading is harmed.

flaws.name: Limited by Language
flaws.description: Only works if you share a language with the subject.

flaws.name: Limited to Emotions
flaws.description: Only reads emotional states, not coherent thoughts or memories.

flaws.name: Limited to Sensory Link
flaws.description: Can only tap into senses, never read thoughts or memories.

flaws.name: Limited to Surface
flaws.description: Caps you at the shallowest degree of mental contact.

flaws.name: Sense-Dependent
flaws.description: Requires an additional sense of the target, like seeing their expression.

extras.name: Metamorph
extras.description: Grants a fully separate set of traits per alternate form, not just a new look.

flaws.name: Resistible
flaws.description: A successful resistance check sees through your disguised form.

extras.name: Affects Insubstantial
extras.description: Confirms Nullify can affect insubstantial targets without a special modifier.

extras.name: Alternate Resistance
extras.description: Uses Fortitude instead of Will for the opposed check.

extras.name: Area Effect
extras.description: Counters every valid target within an area with a single check.

extras.name: Broad
extras.description: Counters a broad category of descriptor, like all magical effects.

extras.name: Concentration
extras.description: Suppresses the countered effect for as long as you keep concentrating.

extras.name: Continuous
extras.description: Suppresses the countered effect indefinitely with no upkeep.

extras.name: Effortless
extras.description: Retrying after a bad failure never requires Extra Effort.

extras.name: Impose Flaw
extras.costFormula: up to -1 point per rank in value
extras.description: Instead of shutting an effect off, saddles it with a temporary flaw.

extras.name: Precise
extras.description: Lets a Simultaneous Nullify pick which of a target's effects are hit.

extras.name: Reaction
extras.description: Usable as a reaction without needing to Ready first.

extras.name: Selective
extras.description: Lets an Area Nullify pick who is and isn't affected.

extras.name: Simultaneous
extras.description: Counters every effect of the chosen descriptor a target has, at once.

extras.name: Sustained
extras.description: Suppresses the countered effect for as long as you keep sustaining it.

flaws.name: Close Range
flaws.description: Requires touching the target instead of working at range.

extras.name: Continuous
extras.description: The obscured area needs no maintenance once established.

extras.name: Independent
extras.description: Fades on its own over time instead of needing upkeep, but can't be relocated.

extras.name: Selective
extras.description: Choose who is and isn't affected by the obscured area.

flaws.name: Close Range
flaws.description: The obscured area is always centered on you.

extras.name: Sustained
extras.description: Turns the normally-always-on bonus into something you activate and maintain.

flaws.name: Fades
flaws.description: Each resistance check it's used for wears the protection down by a rank.

flaws.name: Limited
flaws.description: Only protects against a specific category of damage.

flaws.name: Noticeable
flaws.description: Your toughened state is visibly obvious, like armored skin.

flaws.name: Unreliable
flaws.description: Only offers partial coverage — some attacks get through.

flaws.name: Limited to One Task
flaws.description: Only speeds up one specific kind of task.

flaws.name: Mental Quickness
flaws.description: Only speeds up mental tasks.

flaws.name: Physical Quickness
flaws.description: Only speeds up routine physical tasks.

extras.name: Communication
extras.description: Lets you also communicate with subjects over your Remote Sensing range.

extras.name: Dimensional
extras.description: Extends Remote Sensing into other dimensions (one, a related group, or any).

extras.name: Protected
extras.description: Sensory attacks targeted at your remote sensing point don't affect you.

extras.name: Simultaneous
extras.description: Lets you use your remote and normal senses at the same time.

extras.name: Subtle
extras.description: Makes your remote sensor harder, then impossible, to detect.

extras.name: Targeting
extras.description: Lets you use Perception Range effects through your remote sensing point.

flaws.name: Feedback
flaws.description: Attacks on your remote sensing point can hurt you.

flaws.name: Medium
flaws.description: Only works through a specific medium, like mirrors or shadows.

flaws.name: Noticeable
flaws.description: Your remote sensing point has an obvious tell, like glowing eyes.

extras.name: Atomic
extras.description: Shrinks you down to the molecular or atomic scale.

extras.name: Microscopic
extras.description: Shrinks you down to a cellular scale.

extras.name: Normal Speed
extras.description: Your speed isn't reduced while shrunk.

extras.name: Permanent
extras.description: Your smaller size becomes your normal, permanent size category at no extra cost.

extras.name: Controlled
extras.description: Your minions have no free will; they're under your total, direct control.

extras.name: Heroic
extras.description: Summoned characters are full NPCs rather than being bound by minion rules.

extras.name: Horde
extras.description: Summon your full Multiple Minions count at once with one standard action, Vulnerable until your next turn.

extras.name: Memory Merge
extras.description: You gain a vanishing minion's memories as if you'd experienced them yourself.

extras.name: Mental Link
extras.description: Lets you communicate with and command your minions telepathically.

extras.name: Multiple Minions
extras.description: Doubles your total minion count per rank taken.

extras.name: Sacrifice
extras.description: Lets you redirect a resisted effect onto one of your minions instead of yourself.

extras.name: Variable Type
extras.description: Lets you summon different kinds of minions instead of always an identical one.

flaws.name: Attitude
flaws.description: Summoned minions start out uncooperative rather than loyal.

flaws.name: Hostile
flaws.description: A failed summon check turns the minion against you instead.

flaws.name: Resistible
flaws.description: Minions get a resistance check to avoid being summoned at all.

extras.name: Accurate
extras.description: Lets you teleport to a place you can only describe, not directly perceive.

extras.name: Change Direction
extras.description: Lets you change facing after you arrive.

extras.name: Change Velocity
extras.description: Lets you arrive at rest instead of retaining your prior momentum.

extras.name: Easy
extras.description: Removes the Dazed/Vulnerable penalty after an extended teleport.

extras.name: Extended
extras.description: Lets you make a much longer teleport at the cost of two actions.

extras.name: Increased Mass
extras.description: Lets you carry more mass along when you teleport.

extras.name: Known Location
extras.description: Lets you teleport to a memorized place without perceiving it.

extras.name: Turnabout
extras.description: Lets you teleport in, act, and teleport back as part of the same turn.

flaws.name: Extended Only
flaws.description: You can only make the longer, riskier extended teleport.

flaws.name: Medium
flaws.description: Requires a medium to teleport from and to, like wires or shadows.

extras.name: Continuous
extras.description: Makes the transformation permanent and irreversible except by another Transmute.

flaws.name: Concentration
flaws.description: Requires a Concentrate action each turn to maintain the transformation.

extras.name: Action
extras.description: Lets you reconfigure your Variable pool faster than the default Concentrate action.

extras.name: Triggered
extras.description: Automatically reconfigures in response to a chosen triggering event.

flaws.name: Slow
flaws.description: You can only reconfigure your Variable pool outside of action time.

extras.name: Damaging
extras.description: Lets you directly inflict Damage with Move Object instead of just moving things.

extras.name: Perception
extras.description: Lets you target anything you can accurately perceive, no attack roll needed.

extras.name: Precise
extras.description: Lets you perform fine manipulation tasks, like tying knots or typing.

extras.name: Subtle
extras.description: Removes the normally-visible manifestation (glow, tractor beam, etc.).

flaws.name: Close Range
flaws.description: Only works on objects right next to you, like the Lifting effect.

flaws.name: Concentration
flaws.description: Requires a Concentrate action each turn to use or maintain.

flaws.name: Limited Direction
flaws.description: Can only move objects along a fixed path, like straight up/down or directly toward/away from you.

flaws.name: Limited Material
flaws.description: Only works on a specific type of material, like metal, plants, or water.

extras.name: Diehard
extras.description: Automatically stabilize when Dying, no check needed.

extras.name: Persistent
extras.description: Can regenerate even Incurable damage conditions.

extras.name: Sustained
extras.description: Requires a Sustain action throughout recovery (so it stops while Incapacitated), but allows Extra Effort to boost it temporarily.

flaws.name: Not Against [Descriptor]
flaws.costFormula: -1 point per rank, or -1/-2 points flat for rare descriptors
flaws.description: Can't heal damage from one specific descriptor (fire, holy weapons, etc.).

flaws.name: Only When Dead
flaws.description: Only kicks in to reverse death, not while just injured.

flaws.name: Only When Incapacitated
flaws.description: Doesn't start working until you're Incapacitated, then stops once you've fully recovered.

flaws.name: Source
flaws.description: Requires access to a specific resource (sunlight, electricity, raw material) during recovery.

extras.name: Affects Others
extras.description: Grants the benefit of one or more of your Enhanced Senses to another character.

extras.name: Area
extras.description: Extends an Affects-Others sense to everyone in an area at once.

extras.name: Ranged
extras.description: Extends the range at which you can grant an Affects-Others sense to someone else.

flaws.name: Limited
flaws.description: The sense only works on certain things or under certain circumstances.

flaws.name: Noticeable
flaws.description: Has an obvious tell, like glowing eyes or an audible hum.

flaws.name: Unreliable
flaws.description: The GM secretly rolls reliability; it may simply fail, or feed you wrong information.
